description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-ubuntu-22.04-sanitizers that runs on a schedule, on push to main, and on pull requests to main. The workflow should only run on pull requests labeled with 'run-sanitizer'. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job that checks out the repository with submodules, uses ccache, builds with clang and sanitizers enabled using a custom script, and runs specific tests with sudo privileges.
